source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The root-locus plot of a closed-loop system with unity negative feedback and transfer function \( KG(s) \) in the forward path is shown in the figure. Note that \( K \) is varied from 0 to \( \infty \). Select the transfer function \( G(s) \) that results in the root-locus plot of the closed-loop system as shown in the figure.

the task is to identify G(s) from a plotted control-system root locus, which is inherently visual/spatial

the question combines visual evidence from the figure with control-theory reasoning about poles/zeros and feedback root-locus behavior
multiple-choice selection among structurally different transfer functions suggests more than single-step lookup
verifiability: choices are provided (4 options), making the final answer checkable against a fixed candidate set
answer_text is a specific closed-form transfer function string
